Title: Founder Odyssey

URL Source: https://www.founderodyssey.com/tools/market-size-calculator

Markdown Content:
## Market Size Calculator

Calculate your TAM, SAM, and SOM to understand your market opportunity and project your revenue potential.

🎯

### TAM

Total Addressable Market represents your entire market opportunity. The maximum revenue potential if you captured 100% of the market.

⭐

### SAM

Serviceable Addressable Market is the portion of TAM that you can realistically target with your business model.

💎

### SOM

Serviceable Obtainable Market is your actual target market - the portion of SAM you can realistically capture.

Total Addressable Market (TAM)

$

SAM (% of TAM)

%

SOM (% of SAM)

%

Enter market size values to see the chart

## How to Use This Calculator

1

### Enter Your TAM

Start with your total market size based on market research and industry data.

2

### Calculate SAM

Determine what percentage of TAM you can realistically service.

3

### Estimate SOM

Project the market share you can capture in the medium term.

4

### Review Projections

Analyze your revenue potential across different scenarios.

## Common Questions

### How accurate are these calculations?

The accuracy depends on your input data quality. Use multiple sources and regularly update your numbers as you gather more market intelligence.

### How often should I update these numbers?

Review and update your calculations quarterly or when significant market changes occur to maintain accuracy.

## Validate Your Idea, Launch, Earn

Don't waste time building and trying to sell a product that nobody wants.
